evidence_items.summary: PR structlog#761 adds CallsiteParameter.QUAL_NAME enum value + _get_callsite_qual_name handler in src/structlog/processors.py. Handler reads frame.f_code.co_qualname (Python 3.11+ only). CHANGELOG.md notes the addition under 25.5.0.

Two new tests in tests/processors/test_processors.py: test_qual_name_structlog (asserts qual_name endswith ClassName.method, skipif Python <3.11) and test_qual_name_logging_origin_absent (asserts QUAL_NAME absent when event originates from stdlib LogRecord).

intent_summary: Phase 6.1'b auto-generated bundle for case_id seed_157_hynek_structlog_761 (https://github.com/hynek/structlog PR #761, head_sha f7e9f78d). Claim C.callsite_qual_name.capability_sufficient (type capability_sufficient); test_scope tests/processors/test_processors.py::TestCallsiteParameterAdder.
